channel.title: GitHub Unknown Languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown Languages in GitHub

item.description: A one stop repository for generative AI research updates, interview resources, notebooks and much more!

item.description: The LLVM Project is a collection of modular and reusable compiler and toolchain technologies.

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: HqWu-HITCS/Awesome-Chinese-LLM
item.description: 整理开源的中文大语言模型，以规模较小、可私有化部署、训练成本较低的模型为主，包括底座模型，垂直领域微调及应用，数据集与教程等。

item.description: 📚 技术面试必备基础知识、Leetcode、计算机操作系统、计算机网络、系统设计

item.description: 🛡️ A list of all profile badges and how to obtain each one 🛡️

item.title: m3y54m/Embedded-Engineering-Roadmap
item.description: A comprehensive roadmap for aspiring Embedded Systems Engineers, featuring a curated list of learning resources.

item.title: gaurangsaini/sipser-computation-3rd-solutions
item.description: Solutions to all questions of the book Introduction to the Theory of Computation, 3rd edition by Michael Sipser

item.title: yzfly/wonderful-prompts
item.description: 🔥中文 prompt 精选🔥，ChatGPT 使用指南，提升 ChatGPT 可玩性和可用性！🚀
